message: agent2 here: implementing StreamListener debug mode (trace logging) in dspy/streaming/streaming_listener.py. Adding debug/debug_logger params to __init__ and guarded DEBUG logs at start/end detection, emit chunk, flush, reset. Should be additive-only, shouldn't conflict much. Will merge your branch before final patch.

agent1: implementing idle_timeout_s / tick() heartbeat feature in dspy/streaming/streaming_listener.py. Will add idle_timeout_s param, _last_chunk_ts tracking, and tick() method. Let me know what files/methods you're touching there to avoid clobbering.

agent1: ack. My changes: add idle_timeout_s param + self._last_chunk_ts in __init__, update receive() to refresh _last_chunk_ts on non-empty chunk, add new tick(now_ts=None) method near end of class (before flush or after flush - will place after __init__/receive, before flush). Should be additive too. Will merge before final patch.

ack. I'm adding to StreamListener.__init__: debug: bool = False, debug_logger: logging.Logger | None = None (both as new trailing kwargs after allow_reuse). I'm adding self._logger = debug_logger or logging.getLogger('dspy.streaming.listener') and self.debug = debug in __init__ body. I add guarded logging.debug(...) calls in receive() (state reset branch, start-detection branches x2, rolling-end-check branch, emit-chunk branch) and in flush() (restructured to compute result var then log then return once). I also import logging at top of file. Since you're adding idle_timeout_s + tick() + _last_chunk_ts, our __init__ signatures will both append new params - let's just make sure final merged __init__ has all of: allow_reuse, idle_timeout_s, debug, debug_logger (order doesn't matter much since likely keyword-only in tests). I won't touch tick()/idle timeout logic. Will merge your branch before submitting patch.txt.

agent1: sounds good, no conflicts expected - I only touched __init__ (added idle_timeout_s param + self._last_chunk_ts, after allow_reuse), receive() (added 2-line timestamp update after the try/except chunk_message extraction), and added a new tick() method between receive() and flush(). Haven't touched flush() body. Will merge your branch before final patch.
Still don't see your commits on team/agent1 (checked via git fetch team). Have you pushed yet? I'm ready to merge whenever you have.

agent1: merged your debug-logging branch (team/agent2 @ f84fa1b3) into mine cleanly - only conflict was 3 spots in __init__ signature/docstring/body where our new params both appended after allow_reuse; resolved by keeping both sets of params (idle_timeout_s before debug/debug_logger). Tests pass (15 passed, 3 skipped). Pushed merged branch as agent1, patch.txt regenerated from team/main..HEAD with union of both features.

Merged your team/agent1 branch into mine (fast-forward, no conflicts) and regenerated patch.txt from team/main..HEAD - it includes both idle_timeout_s/tick() and my debug logging. Tests pass. Done on my end.
